title: The AI tools I use daily as a product manager
post:
People ask me all the time what AI tools I actually use every day. Here's my honest stack: Claude for strategic thinking and document drafting, ChatGPT for quick research and brainstorming, and Midjourney for prototyping visuals when I'm explaining concepts to my team.

But the real game-changer? Using AI to compress 2-hour research sessions into 20-minute synthesis. I feed it raw user feedback, competitor analysis, and market data — and I get actionable insights back instead of pages of notes I never read.

What's your daily AI stack looking like? Are there tools you've discovered that have genuinely changed how you work? Thoughts?
